description: Routine should produce an integration design with sequence, data contract (both directions), failure modes table, and rollout plan.

input_ticket.title: SIA MCP tool for richezamor.com chatbot widget
input_ticket.description: The chatbot widget on richezamor.com needs to call SIA's knowledge layer. Design the integration: which MCP tool(s) to expose, request/response shape, auth model, failure modes, and rollout (shadow → staged → full).

smoke_questions: Is the happy-path sequence concrete (named endpoints, not vague arrows)?
Does the data contract specify versioning strategy, not just 'we'll version it'?
Does the idempotency section name the key (e.g., which field)?
Does the rollout plan have a trigger for rollback (not just 'if broken')?
Does observability specify Langfuse span names / metrics, not generic 'we'll add logs'?
success_criteria: All structure sections + at least 4 failure-mode rows + explicit rollback criteria + no etc placeholders
